scripts.dev: corepack pnpm supabase:prepare && corepack pnpm temporal:prepare && node tools/dev/guard-secrets.mjs -- corepack pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter @wanderlust/web --filter @wanderlust/temporal-worker dev
scripts.dev:web: corepack pnpm supabase:prepare && corepack pnpm temporal:prepare && node tools/dev/guard-secrets.mjs -- corepack pnpm --filter @wanderlust/web dev
scripts.dev:worker: corepack pnpm supabase:prepare && corepack pnpm temporal:prepare && node tools/dev/guard-secrets.mjs -- corepack pnpm --filter @wanderlust/temporal-worker dev
scripts.dev:hosted: node tools/dev/run-with-doppler-config.mjs dev -- corepack pnpm -r --parallel --stream --filter @wanderlust/web --filter @wanderlust/temporal-worker dev
scripts.dev:hosted:web: node tools/dev/run-with-doppler-config.mjs dev -- corepack pnpm --filter @wanderlust/web dev
scripts.dev:hosted:worker: node tools/dev/run-with-doppler-config.mjs dev -- corepack pnpm --filter @wanderlust/temporal-worker dev
scripts.temporal:cloud:env:dev: node tools/dev/run-with-doppler-config.mjs dev -- node tools/dev/temporal-cloud.mjs env
scripts.temporal:cloud:env:prod: node tools/dev/run-with-doppler-config.mjs prd -- node tools/dev/temporal-cloud.mjs env
scripts.railway:env:dev: node tools/dev/run-with-doppler-config.mjs dev -- node tools/railway/sync-env.mjs dev
scripts.test: corepack pnpm -r --filter @wanderlust/web --filter @wanderlust/temporal-worker test && corepack pnpm test:repo
scripts.check: node tools/checks/architecture.mjs && node tools/checks/docs.mjs && node tools/checks/plans.mjs && node tools/checks/files.mjs
scripts.check:delivery: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm playwright:smoke
scripts.turbo:dev: corepack pnpm exec turbo run dev --parallel
scripts.turbo:typecheck: corepack pnpm exec turbo run typecheck
